use_cases: Expandable social share button for sharing content across Twitter, Instagram, and LinkedIn platforms
Copy-to-clipboard functionality with visual confirmation feedback for quick link sharing
Dark mode compatible share widget for websites and web applications needing social integration
ai_summary: An expandable social sharing button component with animated expansion using Framer Motion. Features Twitter, Instagram, and LinkedIn share options with brand-specific hover colors, plus a copy-to-clipboard function with checkmark confirmation. Includes click-outside detection for auto-collapse and supports both light and dark modes. Designed for universal use across SaaS, media, and e-commerce platforms requiring social sharing functionality.
